data.task_instructions: Run a compact cross-domain pass over this zebrafish segmentation paper. Extract one chemical condition, one phenotype statement, and one central gene supported by the paper. Each extractor must use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit and must leave identity/ontology resolution to validators. Preserve the explicit zebrafish organism context as ZFIN/NCBITaxon:7955 selector hints for gene or phenotype candidates; those hints are not final identity resolution.

data.custom_input: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one chemical or experimental-condition candidate: SB225002 treatment in embryonic zebrafish segmentation experiments. Preserve dose/timing/context when present and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract phenotype statements or genes in this step, and do not resolve ChEBI or condition ontology IDs in the extractor.
data.step_goal: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one chemical or experimental-condition candidate: SB225002 treatment in embryonic zebrafish segmentation experiments. Preserve dose/timing/context when present and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract phenotype statements or genes in this step, and do not resolve ChEBI or condition ontology IDs in the extractor.

data.custom_input: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one phenotype assertion candidate: mid-trunk myotome boundary or segmentation defects in embryonic zebrafish after SB225002 treatment. Preserve the Danio rerio/ZFIN/NCBITaxon:7955 organism context as selector hints and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract chemicals or genes in this step, and do not resolve phenotype ontology IDs in the extractor.

data.custom_input: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one central gene candidate: zebrafish her1 in the segmentation/small-molecule-screen context. Preserve Danio rerio, ZFIN, and NCBITaxon:7955 hints and use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit. Do not extract chemicals or phenotype statements in this step, and do not resolve gene IDs in the extractor.

Do not extract chemicals or phenotype statements in this step, and do not resolve gene IDs in the extractor.

trial.prompt: Run a compact cross-domain pass over this zebrafish segmentation paper. Extract one chemical condition, one phenotype statement, and one central gene supported by the paper. Each extractor must use read_chunk span IDs with record_evidence for one supporting evidence unit and must leave identity/ontology resolution to validators.
